snippet: Where more than one employee is eligible to be reimbursed in respect of the same dependant(s), one employee will receive the 'employee with dependants' rate and the other the 'employee without dependants' rate. For remote allowance purposes 'dependant' is defined as a person maintained by and permanently domiciled with an employee, including a spouse, a child under 16 years of age, a full-time student child and a parent.
